name: bityllm
description: A tiny GPT trained from scratch in pure TypeScript, powering a virtual terminal of hallucinated binaries.

scripts.pages: tsc -p tsconfig.web.json && rm -rf docs && mkdir -p docs && cp examples/web/index.html docs/ && cp -R examples/web/dist docs/dist && cp models/terminal.int8.bity docs/terminal.int8.bity && cp examples/web/bity.svg docs/bity.svg
